mapper.select: SELECT id, user_id AS userId, purchased, purchase_time AS purchaseTime, created_at AS createdAt FROM user_fund WHERE user_id = #{userId}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO user_fund (user_id, purchased) VALUES (#{userId}, 0) ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE user_id = user_id
mapper.select: SELECT reward_level FROM fund_claim WHERE user_id = #{userId} ORDER BY reward_level
